claims.claim: A dependency-free intervention harness splits the bank into 400 training pairs (800 examples) and 800 held-out pairs (1,600 examples), induces a restricted prompt-policy overlay from training clusters, and evaluates against both held-out bank examples and a naive synthetic baseline.

claims.claim: On held-out bank data, the targeted prompt-policy overlay achieves pair-both-correct accuracy of 1.000, compared to 0.490 for the lexical shortcut baseline (uplift +0.510).
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Naive synthetic accuracy remains unchanged at 1.000 under both conditions.
